name: EGB OE TL.Z./HENKEL VZ
summary: Henkel AG & Co. KGaA operates worldwide in the adhesives technologies, beauty care, and laundry & home care markets. The company offers a wide range of branded consumer goods and industrial products, including adhesives, sealants, functional coatings, laundry detergents, hair care products, and beauty products. Henkel is headquartered in Düsseldorf, Germany.
